docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUN, IL DBA M.A.G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOO, HWANG S.
